description_full:
DK Household Brands is part of the renowned Diethelm Keller Group. Our brand portfolio includes Zyliss, Cole & Mason and AdHoc. 




Our mission is clear: we build leading brands and continuously strengthen our effectiveness as a multi-brand company across our core markets. We are committed to enriching homes around the world - not only in the kitchen, but throughout living spaces with products every household needs. Are you experienced in the marketplace environment, performance-driven, and motivated to scale brands internationally? 




Join our team in Mannheim and actively shape the expansion of our European marketplace strategy 




Key Responsibilities: 

• Operational management and strategic development of our national and Europe-wide online marketplaces 

• Creation and optimization of product listings (content, SEO, A+ etc.) 

• Confident use of our PIM system, including channel-specific adaptation and preparation of product data for individual marketplaces 

• Management and coordination of marketplace activities via our middleware solutions 

• Monitoring and steering of relevant KPIs (visibility, conversion, advertising performance) 

• Planning and execution of promotions and marketplace campaigns 

• Competitive, market and potential analyses 

• Close collaboration with marketing, sales and product management 




About You: 

• Degree in E-Commerce or Business Administration, or a comparable commercial qualification 

• Experience in marketplace management, ideally with Amazon Seller Central, Otto Market or Kaufland Seller 

• Interest in expanding additional international sales channels 

• Strong analytical mindset and KPI-driven approach 

• Structured, independent and proactive working style 

• Good English skills (required) 

• Additional languages such as French, Italian or Polish are a plus 

• Proficient use of MS Office, especially Excel 




What we offer: 

• Responsible role with significant creative freedom and recognition of your achievements 

• Motivating work atmosphere within a professional and collaborative team 

• Flat hierarchies and short decision-making processes 

• Flexible working hours and remote work options 

• Convenient location with good parking facilities 

• 30 days of annual leave 

• Competitive compensation
